reviews.text:
We booked Justin for our September 2025 wedding at Winter Park and are absolutely blown away by his incredible work. There are many wedding photographers to choose from, but Justin stands out among them all. His unparalleled skill, professionalism, attention to detail, and dedication to his craft was clear from the very beginning and his mastery truly shines in all the images from the day that will now be with us for a lifetime. It snowed six inches the night before our big day and Justin made everything on the day of look just as magical as it felt. Alongside talented second shooter Matt, Justin captured so many real moments and truly elevated our entire wedding experience with top-notch equipment and technology.

Justin's quick thinking and adaptability made all the difference. The resort shut down the chairlifts at the last minute due to weather and Justin sprang into action to make the most amazing and memorable gondola photos for us. During the reception, he saw a perfect opportunity for night photos and got us outside in time for the most incredible sunset. Thank you for going above and beyond to make the best day of our lives unforgettable!

Justin is an incredibly talented photographer!

If you are looking for photos that are unique and compositionally beautiful, Justin is your guy! We particularly loved his scenic shots (check out the one I've included here for a little taste of what he can do)!

We honestly hardly noticed pictures were being taken that day, which made for very natural, authentic photographs.

My husband and I thought he was a pleasure to work with - we really felt he wanted us to enjoy our day fully, and did all in his power to make that happen!

We are THRILLED with the photographs from our special weekend!

Justin isn't just a photographer; he's a magician wielding a camera, turning moments into memories that dance off the pages of our wedding album. From the first consultation to the final click of the shutter, Justin's dedication to his craft was evident. He meticulously planned every detail, ensuring our day flowed seamlessly despite the looming threat of rain at Arapahoe Basin.

On our wedding day, as the clouds hung heavy and the rain threatened to dampen spirits, Justin remained undaunted. Alongside his talented assistant, Mike, he worked tirelessly, adapting to the ever-changing weather with ease. Their ability to capture the beauty of the day, even amidst the gloom, was nothing short of miraculous.

Throughout the day, Justin's passion for his craft shone brightly. From the intimate first look at Pass Lake to the laughter-filled moments on the dance floor, he captured every emotion with precision and artistry. His insistence on stealing moments alone amidst the chaos of the day allowed us to savor the magic of our union against the breathtaking backdrop of the mountains.

As the sun remained hidden behind the clouds for the majority of the wedding day, its eventual descent below the horizon was a welcome surprise, casting a radiant alpenglow upon the landscape. Justin and Mike, seizing the opportunity, whisked us outside to capture the golden hour's ethereal beauty. These impromptu moments, immortalized in photographs, serve as timeless reminders of the love and joy that filled our hearts on that magical day, despite the earlier lack of sunlight.

One of the most memorable moments of the day occurred when Justin, amidst the hustle and bustle of the festivities, noticed that the planned "Family Fireball Shot" photo was about to be missed. With characteristic grace and composure, he rallied the troops, ensuring that this spontaneous and cherished moment was captured for eternity.

Looking back, we are eternally grateful to Justin for his unwavering dedication, creativity, and professionalism. He didn't just capture photos; he curated memories that will last a lifetime. To anyone seeking a photographer who goes above and beyond to transform moments into memories, we wholeheartedly recommend Justin. Thank you, Justin and Mike, for making our wedding day an unforgettable journey filled with laughter, love, and timeless photographs.

Its hard for me to summarize just how amazing Justin is and that working with him was the absolute highlight of my wedding. From taking the time to meet us to get to know who we are as people and our story, to working seamlessly with the various wedding vendors, we knew Justin would capture the vision and spirit of our wedding and not just 'take pictures.'
To say Justin went above and beyond is an understatement. He was truly the wedding MVP and I will be forever grateful!
When I heard my Grandma was not well enough to attend my wedding my heart shattered into a million pieces. I could not comprehend not being able to see her on the most important day of my life. I tried to focus on being the bride and being happy but felt like a  piece of my heart was missing.
Seeing my sadness, Justin stepped up to the plate and took control of the situation to ensure my wedding day was everything I dreamed of.
I will never forget what he said to me:  "If Grandma can't come to us, we're going to her."  And just like that, he coordinated with my wedding planner, videographer, venue and family in real time to make it happen. He literally rearranged the entire afternoon and wedding because he just knew how important it was to me!
I am SO grateful to Justin and his team for making this moment happen. It meant everything.
After being able to spend this time with my Grandma, the rest of the day felt like an absolute DREAM. The happiness he was able to deliver and capture is PRICELESS!  I cherish these photos and memories, and will be forever thankful to Justin for making my wedding day the best day of my life!

Justin and I connected a few years back through a mutual friend and I have been an admirer of his work ever since.  Unfortunately, I was married long before we met or he would have been my pick for a wedding photographer.  His work is unique and on a different level.  Over the years, I have gotten to know Justin and the level of detail, perfectionism, and pride he takes in his craft is impressive.  I have had the opportunity to work with Justin on several projects including an online magazine as well as a blog post and his attention to detail is phenomenal.  As you might imagine, the pictures were amazing.  I highly recommend Justin if you are looking for a wedding photographer that brings something unique and special on such an important day.
